creator: oliver@FreeBSD.org
text:
Beside my FreeBSD 6 boxes, I only have a CURRENT box running already 8.
Over the last days I tried several situations, but all leading to the
same thing. I can move every icon in panel 1 to every place in panel 1
I also can move every item between both panels.
So - I'm not able to reproduce this error on FreeBSD 8.
I don't have a FreeBSD 7 system around.
